title: cornus sanguinea subsp. cilicica
intro: Cornus sanguinea subsp. cilicica, also known as the Cilician dogwood, is a subspecies of the dogwood plant, native to the Cilician region of Turkey. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cilician dogwood include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the cardiovascular system. Cilician dogwood is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as a tincture, to take advantage of its herbal properties.
